briefdescription.para: Activates ONE ability that matches this tag (deterministic pick).
Activates ONE ability that matches ANY of the tags (deterministic pick).
Activates ALL abilities matching this tag (optional use-case).
Cancels abilities that match this tag (tag must be on the ability).
Cancels abilities that match ANY of the tags (tags must be on the ability).
Client request path for pickup collection; server validates range and collection state.
Base ship character for Alien Ramen.

listitem.para: ASC is owned by PlayerState, Avatar is this pawn.
On server possession: clears loadout, grants common ability set, then resolves ship/hat rows from LoadoutTags and applies baseline. Secondary lane is legacy/deprecated and optional.
Exposes generic tag-based activation/cancel API for PlayerController / Blueprint.
